query: SELECT p.id, p.clienteId, c.nomeCompleto, p.numeroCnj, p.tipoAcao, p.analiseIA IS NOT NULL as temAnalise, p.faseAtual FROM processos p JOIN clientes c ON p.clienteId = c.id WHERE p.clienteId IN (1,2,5,6,9,11,13) ORDER BY c.nomeCompleto;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3Xc9RJjwPAzqyUN.e36368bedae0 --database 4imSnKhwnzycXmSWcGeMqe --execute SELECT p.id, p.clienteId, c.nomeCompleto, p.numeroCnj, p.tipoAcao, p.analiseIA IS NOT NULL as temAnalise, p.faseAtual FROM processos p JOIN clientes c ON p.clienteId = c.id WHERE p.clienteId IN (1,2,5,6,9,11,13) ORDER BY c.nomeCompleto;
